---
layout: default
title: "Monsoon Session Disruptions and Legislative Updates"
date: 2026-07-20T11:18:15.050701+00:00
summary: "Parliament faces immediate adjournments amid protests over exam scandals, while the government introduces a bill to expand the Supreme Court's bench strength"
run_time_ist: "4:48PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 4:48PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Parliamentary disruptions:</strong> Both Houses of Parliament were adjourned repeatedly as the Opposition staged protests over the &quot;Cockroach&quot; movement&#x27;s march, alleged exam leaks, and controversies surrounding Ram Mandir fund management.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I32</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I33</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinwFBVV95cUxOdHQyZnJUOWZNcjV2RHBDbzh4dVV3U2FaM3BRUzNZVFJpWElUa3llaklOMVFqTTlCSE9wby1admkxWEJkQ0lKR2xUZDBLdVY0MXZCcXpkSnBRbEUyUF9pbDIxUTFhNW1meVYzYzEydEt3ZVVWeXBRcERSQi1POFJfbFY4UENhY2ZzZEt0VV92UzdFYmc4SWRUYVBycUExUUE?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I34</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I35</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I41</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Protest escalation:</strong> Thousands of demonstrators, including supporters of the &quot;Cockroach&quot; movement, marched on Parliament to demand the Education Minister&#x27;s resignation over botched entrance exams, leading to police detentions and the use of tear gas.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitwFBVV95cUxQUm03WGJ4dXBXemV0VkZrdVotZHNnYU5NZXpNMUNrcXExUHh2SGRfOC1UNWo5ZmNWWG9lVk82ZmZmVWpMNTRfaDR4YmpSU1BFbm1UZl9GR0tHbEJvdXhVWXBQcWhYaTg4dlVCeHBVZG1yamNVOTgwTXNrMXlVZ1U4RVlxZnhuQ3VXYmxsdG94ZHBnZFM5TGxfazRrRDJESjRwZEFFamdKWGMzN3puaXZjTDhKTTl3Vk0?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I15</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiSEFVX3lxTE1qcFNsclRWWGYxdWRoRDZla1l0RFk0dExER2tBTEptMHVPMDRmMGN5cEhYS1N3b0Z5YlpmTVoyckZFTGIwN2tReg?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I16</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I20</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I21</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I36</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>PM&#x27;s opening remarks:</strong> Prime Minister Modi called for a productive Monsoon Session while criticizing political opponents and urging for constructive legislative debate.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMifkFVX3lxTFBEMHNsbjBfSjIzYXhDRkxfN2dfczVyQmg3UWRtaVNJdjRYVTNRVzROZkFPQUpjQm1rQWI2QThjVE1nTFVkQ29jREFkSXJicktOV3FCU1d1aGFqYVpRNHl0Mk1QUmI0WlZURm5OUkVsZTd0OXQwak1qd3JiRDh0UQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I24</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I25</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I30</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I31</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Supreme Court expansion:</strong> The government introduced the Supreme Court (Number of Judges) Amendment Bill, 2026, in the Lok Sabha, aiming to increase the sanctioned strength of the judiciary to 38 judges.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W6</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W5</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Judicial benefits:</strong> The Supreme Court directed the Centre to establish a committee to formulate a uniform policy regarding post-retirement facilities for High Court judges across the country.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W6</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W9</a></span></li>
</ul>

<details class="tp-sources">

  <li><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[I7] Bill To Increase Number Of Supreme Court Judges To Be Introduced In Lok Sabha Today - Live Law</a> Live Law</li>

  <li><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilwFBVV95cUxPczBlSG1LZzVzMDlhT2xJcnMzVC1RTFpnSmJLRkFQWFJIbHhvSmRKenNWUHZvckVOSzdUVnNiaVBwY3BORjZVdHY2Z2FuR0lNak5BSTR6MEVONFh3bDhfWmh1SW40b2pJeVlCOERwQXRsb25BbV9ENTdtY1BhUFVCeXpQOEJCLWJDWUg5UHBnekFJaEV3cmVv?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[I22] Indian Protesters March on Parliament After Exam Scandal - The New York Times</a> The New York Times</li>

  <li><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMifkFVX3lxTFBEMHNsbjBfSjIzYXhDRkxfN2dfczVyQmg3UWRtaVNJdjRYVTNRVzROZkFPQUpjQm1rQWI2QThjVE1nTFVkQ29jREFkSXJicktOV3FCU1d1aGFqYVpRNHl0Mk1QUmI0WlZURm5OUkVsZTd0OXQwak1qd3JiRDh0UQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[I24] Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi&#x27;s statement at the start of the Monsoon Session of 2026 - PIB</a> PIB</li>
  <li><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[I25] PM’s remarks at the start of Monsoon Session 2026 of the Parliament - PM India</a> PM India</li>

  <li><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinwFBVV95cUxOdHQyZnJUOWZNcjV2RHBDbzh4dVV3U2FaM3BRUzNZVFJpWElUa3llaklOMVFqTTlCSE9wby1admkxWEJkQ0lKR2xUZDBLdVY0MXZCcXpkSnBRbEUyUF9pbDIxUTFhNW1meVYzYzEydEt3ZVVWeXBRcERSQi1POFJfbFY4UENhY2ZzZEt0VV92UzdFYmc4SWRUYVBycUExUUE?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[I34] Rajya Sabha adjourned over Jantar Mantar protest - Awaz The Voice</a> Awaz The Voice</li>
